description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the baasie/java-node-terraform:latest Docker image and defines two stages: AAT and deploy. In the AAT stage add an AAT job that runs `npm i --silent` then `npm run aat`, and publishes the `target/site/serenity/` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that moves `target/site/serenity/` to `public/`, sets the environment name to production, keeps the `public/` artifact for 30 days, and only runs on the master branch. Ensure the pages job is configured for GitLab Pages deployment.
